description: Schema contract for .beads/artifacts/<issue-id>/TICKET.md. Future-owned fields stay absent until their owner acts.

triage_records.required_when: bv materially influenced issue selection or decomposition
triage_records.record_owner_rule: beo-plan may append issue_selection and decomposition records; triage_records are plan-owned only. Later phases do not append new triage records.

debug.rule: Optional diagnosis summary/evidence field owned by beo-debug; runtime_events remain canonical for handoff/return state.

human_gates.secret_rule: Secret answers store handles only, never secret values.
human_gates.authorization_gate_validity: Authorization gates must include valid_for_issue_id or expires_at.

runtime_event.validator_rule: beo_check.py validates required fields, owner, issue_id, registered values, handoff/return matching, abandon_reason, change_request routing, and learning candidate metadata. Advisory recall is a helper action, not a runtime handoff/return subtype.
runtime_event.learning_candidate_rule: source_phase must match owner; source_event_id is required. beo-debug candidates require a prior debug return and source_event_id must reference that prior return; beo-review candidates require a prior verdict or review routing event and source_event_id must reference that prior route. Learning candidates never reopen delivery or replace the source route.

cannot_deliver_reasons.description: Terminal cannot_deliver taxonomy visible to operator and helper; routes to user for explicit continuation, reassignment, or issue closure decision.

reason_descriptions.user_owned: Blocker requires user decision, authorization, secret, clarification, or external action outside BEO scope.
reason_descriptions.unsafe_environment: Repository state, git status, or environment preconditions make delivery unsafe; requires user-driven cleanup or reset.
reason_descriptions.unavailable_dependency: Required tool, library, service, or external system is unavailable and execution cannot proceed without it.
reason_descriptions.scope_invalid: Approved scope is provably insufficient, contradictory, or blocked by immovable constraints; requires user-driven rescope or abandon.
reason_descriptions.tool_missing: Required BEO helper, br, bv, or verification command is missing and no safe fallback exists.

cannot_deliver_reasons.operator_rule: cannot_deliver requires a registered reason and routes to user; it never silently fails or auto-abandons without user visibility.

repair_budget_tracking.description: Review tracks repair attempts to enforce mode-specific budget ceiling and prevent infinite repair loops.
repair_budget_tracking.counter_location: state.json review.repair_counter field, owned by beo-review
repair_budget_tracking.counter_rule: Repair counter increments on each repair route emission (repair_same_scope, repair_rescope). Counter resets only on new PASS_EXECUTE after user-driven plan restart or issue reassignment.
repair_budget_tracking.budget_check: Before emitting repair route, beo-review checks repair_counter < mode_budget from profiles.json repair_budget_policy.
repair_budget_tracking.budget_exceeded_route: repair_budget_exceeded routes to user with current repair_counter, mode_budget, and explicit continuation options.
repair_budget_tracking.strict_mode_budget: Strict mode repair budget is explicit per ticket or requires Human Gate confirmation per repair; no auto-repair ceiling.

strict.rule: Strict mode is mandatory for external side effects, stateful external systems, security/privacy/access impact, cost/data/deploy risk, or irreversible operations.

quick_optional_field_rule: Absent optional fields mean not applicable in quick mode unless ticket-schema requires them; profile-derived defaults are canonical in profiles.json posture_profiles.repo_only_low_risk and flow_profiles.tiny_repo_edit.

done_target.rule: Single scalar atomic completion target; one independently approvable outcome.

done.rule: List of subcriteria or details that support the single done_target; must not encode independent completion targets.

acceptance_criteria.rule: Review checklist used to verify done_target and scope; should not merely duplicate done.

soft_field_rule: assumptions and non_goals are soft drift only; any fact that changes scope, safety, authorization, side effects, rollback, or acceptance must also be represented in approval-bearing fields.

files.legacy_string: sha256:<hex> or missing is accepted for compatibility

structured.rule: expected_missing and generated_declared may begin missing before mutation; existing must bind the prior hash.
